title: festuca myuros subsp. pseudomyuros
intro: Festuca myuros subsp. pseudomyuros is a subspecies of the false brome or false chess grass, a type of flowering plant in the grass family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Festuca myuros subsp. pseudomyuros include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for its medicinal uses.
